zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Bunker於1708年7月19日出生在美國新罕布夏州斯特拉福德多福時，她的父親James Bunker81歲，母親Sarah Nute60歲。她於1683年9月與Thomas Drew在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1799年5月21日享年90歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Bunker于1708年7月19日出生在美国新罕布什尔州斯特拉福德多福时，她的父亲James Bunker81岁，母亲Sarah Nute60岁。她于1683年9月与Thomas Drew在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1799年5月21日享年90岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bunker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname, of Norman origin, for a reliable or good-hearted person, from Old French bon ‘good’ + cuer ‘heart’ (from Latin cor).
History: Bunker Hill in Charlestown, MA, was named as land assigned in 1634 to George Bunker of Charlestown, who had emigrated from Odell in Bedfordshire, England.

variants.name: Banker
meanings: English: from Middle English banker, banc(o)ur, bankquer, bankert ‘covering of tapestry or other fabric for a bench, couch, or chair; ornamental hanging’, possibly a nickname or occupational name for someone who made or sold such things.
English: occupational name possibly from Middle English benker, seemingly ‘maker of benches’ but recorded only in names.
English: perhaps a variant of   Bunker  .

variants.name: Bunkers
meanings: Possibly also an altered form of English   Bunker  .
In some cases possibly also Dutch: perhaps a variant of Benkers, itself a cognate of German Benkert . The surname Bunkers is very rare in the Netherlands.

variants.name: Boenker
meanings: occupational name for a carpenter, a rounded form of   Benker  .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: The First Constitution
historicEvents.description: Serving the newly created United States of America as the first constitution, the Articles of Confederation were an agreement among the 13 original states preserving the independence and sovereignty of the states. But with a limited central government, the Constitutional Convention came together to replace the Articles of Confederation with a more established Constitution and central government on where the states can be represented and voice their concerns and comments to build up the nation.

historicEvents.title: New Hampshire Helps Ratify the US Constitution
historicEvents.description: On June 21, 1788, New Hampshire became the ninth and final state needed to ratify the US Constitution and make it the official law of the land

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Bunker was born on 19 July 1708, in Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, United States, her father, James Bunker, was 81 and her mother, Sarah Nute, was 60. She married Thomas Drew in September 1683, in Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 21 May 1799, at the age of 90.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Bunker est née le 19 juillet 1708, à Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, États-Unis, son père, James Bunker, avait 81 ans et sa mère, Sarah Nute, avait 60 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Drew en septembre 1683, à Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 mai 1799, à l’âge de 90 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Bunker am 19. Juli 1708 in Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Bunker 81 und ihre Mutter Sarah Nute 60. Sie hat im September 1683 in Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America Thomas Drew geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. Mai 1799 im Alter von 90 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Bunker è nata il il 19 luglio 1708 nel Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, James Bunker, aveva 81 anni e sua madre, Sarah Nute, aveva 60 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Drew nel settembre 1683, nel Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 21 maggio 1799, all'età di 90 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Bunkerが1708年7月19日にアメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ストラフォードドバーで生まれた時，父James Bunkerは81歳，母Sarah Nuteは60歳であった。1683年9月にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアストラフォードドバーでThomas Drewと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1799年5月21日に90歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Bunker(이)가 1708년 7월 19일 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 스트래퍼드 도버에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Bunker(은)는 81세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Nute(은)는 60세였다. 그녀는 1683년 9월 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버에서 Thomas Drew(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1799년 5월 21일 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Bunker nasceu em 19 de julho de 1708, em Dover, Strafford, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, James Bunker, tinha 81 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Nute, tinha 60 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Drew em setembro de 1683, em Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de maio de 1799, com 90 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Bunker родилась 19 июля 1708 г. в местности довир, страффорд, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени James Bunker было 81 год, а матери, которую звали Sarah Nute, 60. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Drew сентябрь 1683 г. в местности довир, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 21 мая 1799 г. в возрасте 90 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Bunker nació el 19 de julio de 1708, en Dover, Strafford, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos, su papá, James Bunker, tenía 81 años y su mamá, Sarah Nute, tenía 60 años. Se casó con Thomas Drew en septiembre de 1683, en Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 21 de mayo de 1799, a la edad de 90 años.
